hooks.prompt: Check if the edited file involves WebSocket, Socket.io, SSE, or real-time communication code. If so, verify: 1) Authentication is present on connections (no unauthenticated WebSocket/SSE endpoints), 2) Input validation exists for incoming messages, 3) Message size limits are set, 4) Cleanup handlers exist for disconnect events, 5) Reconnection logic is implemented on the client side. Respond with {"ok": true} if all applicable checks pass, or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} listing what's missing. If the file is not related to real-time code, respond {"ok": true}.
